name: Cross Porter
desc: You can target 1 monster you control; send that target to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Neo-Spacian" monster from your hand. When this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Neo-Spacian" monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 monster you control; send that target to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Neo-Spacian" monster from your hand. When this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Neo-Spacian" monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: You can target 1 monster you control; send that target to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Neo-Spacian" monster from your hand. When this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Neo-Spacian" monster from your Deck to your hand.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
